summary: Phone normalization feature fully tested and working. Backend API /api/utils/normalize-phone correctly normalizes Brazilian phone numbers to E.164 format (+55DDNNNNNNNNN). Frontend PhoneInput component validates in real-time with visual feedback. All integration points (booking, VIP clients, settings) properly normalize phones before saving.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phone normalization feature fully implemented and tested. The normalize_brazilian_phone() function in server.py handles all Brazilian phone formats and converts to E.164 (+55DDNNNNNNNNN). PhoneInput component in frontend calls /api/utils/normalize-phone with debounce for real-time validation. All phone inputs in the app (booking, VIP, settings) use this component.

phone_normalization_endpoint.details: /api/utils/normalize-phone accepts various formats and returns {success, normalized, formatted, error}

phone_input_component.details: PhoneInput component validates in real-time with green/red indicators and formatted preview

public_booking_phone.details: Phone input on /b/{slug} validates and triggers VIP check

vip_detection_by_phone.details: VIP status detected regardless of phone format entered

settings_phone_inputs.details: Barbershop phone and WhatsApp inputs validate correctly

vip_client_phone_input.details: VIP client creation dialog validates phone correctly
